results.tagline: Few words, action over talk—the cool-headed problem-solver you can count on when it matters most.
results.rarity: About 5% of the population—more common among men than women.
results.cognition: Your dominant function, Introverted Thinking (Ti), takes apart how things work in your head; your auxiliary function, Extraverted Sensing (Se), lets you build and adapt precisely in the moment. Your tertiary Ni and inferior Fe leave you less skilled at expressing emotion and maintaining relationships over the long haul.
results.description: You're a cool-headed problem-solver—independent, practical, and unflappable, with a natural instinct for machines, tools, and any 'how does this work' puzzle. You're a person of few words who lets action speak louder, loves freedom, and hates being tied down by rules—the kind you can count on most when it matters. You understand the world through your hands and your logic: rather than talk theory, you'd rather take something apart and see how it actually works. When crisis hits and everyone else panics, you turn oddly clear-headed.
strengths: Outstanding hands-on and problem-solving ability
Cool and rational—especially composed under pressure and in crisis
Powerful on-the-spot adaptability and nimble logical reflexes
Independent—you pick up any tool or technique fast
challenges: Stiff emotional expression that can come across as distant and cold
Not great at long-term commitment or nurturing slow-and-steady relationships
Prone to impulsive acts in pursuit of thrills or freedom
Little patience for long-range planning and routine responsibilities
results.relationship: In relationships you value freedom and space, and dislike clingy or emotional dynamics. Your love language is action—fixing things for your partner, quietly showing up when needed. But intimacy can't survive on problem-solving alone; practicing voicing your inner feelings and giving your partner a little emotional response makes your connection run deeper.
results.career: You suit hands-on, technical, autonomy-driven fields: engineering, mechanics, IT, driving, sports, emergency response, and any work that calls for building things and reacting on the fly. You're most at ease in free, flexible environments where you can solve problems independently—and you hate red tape, drawn-out meetings, and emotional office politics.
results.growth: Your composure and skill put people at ease, but intimacy can't be sustained by 'problem-solving' alone. Try 'saying' your inner feelings out loud too—one word of expression to someone you care about beats quietly doing ten things. Occasionally drop the 'I've got it,' and let others into your world too.

results.title: ISFP · Adventurer
results.tagline: A living-in-the-moment life artist with a gentle tenderness hidden in the details.
results.rarity: About 9% of the population—quite common in art and design.
results.cognition: Your dominant function, Introverted Feeling (Fi), holds firm to a quiet yet profound set of personal values; your auxiliary function, Extraverted Sensing (Se), soaks up the beauty of the present with your whole being—color, sound, texture, and emotion. Your tertiary Ni and inferior Te make you less skilled at long-range planning and hard-nosed decisiveness.
results.description: You're a gentle life artist—humble, easygoing, aesthetically rich and empathetic, understated yet hiding a delicate tenderness in the details. You value freedom and authenticity, and you hate being controlled or forced to betray your true self. You live in the moment and keenly catch life's fleeting beauty—a ray of light, a song, a glance. You're not one to declare your feelings in words, but through actions and creations you quietly express the softness within.
strengths: Keen aesthetic sense and perception—skilled at finding beauty in life
Gentle, considerate, and empathetic—you put people at ease
Present-focused and adaptable—you roll with whatever comes
True to your own values, with a quiet steadfastness about what you care about
challenges: You avoid conflict and long-term planning, prone to just getting by
Overly low-key—you don't fight for what you want
You internalize emotions easily, silently enduring without letting anyone know
Sensitive to criticism, easily hurt by others' opinions
results.relationship: In relationships you're gentle, considerate, and value genuine connection, quietly giving to those you love in nuanced ways. But you also tend to suppress your thoughts and dodge problems you should face. Learning to voice your inner needs and feelings, and to believe you deserve the same tenderness in return, makes your relationships more real and lasting.
results.career: You suit fields that express beauty and stay close to feeling: art and design, music, photography, handcraft, cooking, fashion, and any work that prizes aesthetics and freedom. You're most inspired in flexible, respectful environments where you can be creative—and struggle most in high-pressure, cutthroat, rigidly systemized workplaces that force you to suppress yourself.
results.growth: You perceive the world so tenderly—now believe you deserve to be treated with the same tenderness. Practice speaking your thoughts and needs out loud—silence won't make you easier to be around, it just leaves the people who care about you guessing. Your gentleness is a gift; don't forget to give some to yourself too.

results.title: ESTP · Entrepreneur
results.tagline: A live-in-the-moment person of action who's at their best turning danger into safety under pressure.
results.rarity: About 4% of the population—common in sales, sports, and entrepreneurship.
results.cognition: Your dominant function, Extraverted Sensing (Se), keenly seizes every opportunity and shift in the moment; your auxiliary function, Introverted Thinking (Ti), rapidly calculates the most effective next move. Your tertiary Fe and inferior Ni make you favor immediate action and grow impatient with long-range abstract planning.
results.description: You're an adventurer of action—energetic, bold, practical, and lightning-quick, at your best improvising and turning danger into safety amid chaos and pressure. You live in the moment and hate empty talk, believing it's better to just do it than to overthink. You've got a natural nose for opportunity and dare to move first while others hesitate. Life, to you, is a game you have to play hands-on—rather than standing on the sidelines analyzing, you'd rather jump in and settle it in the arena.
strengths: Powerful drive and nerve—you dare to dream, dare to act, and decide on the spot
Quick-reacting—skilled at improvising in chaos and seizing opportunity
Practical and flexible—you swiftly solve the real problem in front of you
Full of energy and charm—a natural at getting a room going
challenges: Prone to acting on impulse without enough thought for long-term consequences
Can't stand boredom or detail, making persistence hard
You take unnecessary risks in pursuit of thrills
Sometimes overlook others' feelings and come across as too blunt
results.relationship: In relationships you're passionate, fun, and full of energy, bringing your partner plenty of surprises and adventure. But you also need to learn to hit the brakes on 'act first, think later,' and give the relationship more stability and commitment. The keys to a lasting bond are practicing one extra thought—'how does this affect our future?'—before you decide, and offering your partner steady, consistent presence.
results.career: You suit fast-paced, ever-changing, in-the-moment fields: sales, entrepreneurship, negotiation, sports, crisis management, entertainment, and any work that calls for action and adaptability. You do your best in free, challenging environments with immediate, visible results—and can't tolerate unchanging, red-tape-heavy, step-by-step work.
results.growth: Your drive is a rare gift, but 'act first, think later' sometimes needs a brake too. Before big decisions, force yourself to think one step further—'and then what?'—pair your nerve with foresight and you'll be unstoppable. And remember, the people around you want more than your excitement—they want your steady presence.

results.title: ESFP · Entertainer
results.tagline: A born star of the stage who spreads joy to everyone around them.
results.rarity: About 9% of the population—a common type full of energy and charm.
results.cognition: Your dominant function, Extraverted Sensing (Se), fully embraces every bit of brilliance and sensory experience in the moment; your auxiliary function, Introverted Feeling (Fi), infuses life with genuine passion and value. Your tertiary Te and inferior Ni make you less skilled at long-range planning and abstract strategy.
results.description: You're a born star of the stage—lively, generous, and charismatic, the soul of the party and the spark that lights the mood, always spreading joy to everyone around you. You love life and value relationships, believing life should be lived fully and authentically. You're skilled at savoring every moment of the present, and you can create laughter even at an ordinary gathering. Your very presence is like a beam of sunshine, unconsciously putting people at ease and getting them to enjoy the moment with you.
strengths: Bursting with enthusiasm, with the charm to light up a room and infect others
Approachable and generous—skilled at getting along and making friends
Present-focused and bold to experience—you live life to the fullest
Sincere and glad to share, bringing those around you loads of positive energy
challenges: You dodge serious, long-term problems, prone to just getting by
Can't stand boredom or planning—execution and discipline tend to be weak
Fairly sensitive to criticism and prone to getting emotional
Chasing present pleasure, you may overspend on impulse or get distracted
results.relationship: In relationships you're passionate, romantic, and generous, always making every day feel like a celebration. But you also need to learn to face the less-fun-yet-important realities of a relationship. Practicing a bit of planning and commitment for the relationship's future—on top of enjoying the present—adds a layer of solid ground beneath all the fun.
results.career: You suit fields where you can perform, interact, and be seen: entertainment, hosting, sales, events, food and hospitality, tourism, and any work that prizes interpersonal charm and being in the moment. You're most energized in lively, free environments with immediate feedback—and struggle most with monotonous, isolating, dull work that keeps you seated and planning.
results.growth: You bring joy to the whole world, but don't let 'living in the moment' become an excuse to run from the future. Try saving a little 'boring effort' for tomorrow's you—a bit more planning now means a bit more freedom later. Your radiance is dazzling; pair it with a little grounding and it'll shine far longer.
